description: User types a question onto the screen: 'What makes you lean towards a short task right now?'
frame_description: A dark screen with a central prompt and an 'Open' button. Text is appearing as if being typed.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the third tab in the browser's tab bar.

description: A preview window of the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab content appears below the tab bar.
frame_description: A small thumbnail preview of the Figma prototype is visible below the browser's address bar.

description: User types a follow-up question: 'As you look at the options for short tasks, what are you seeing that helps you decide which one to go for?'
frame_description: The previous text is replaced by a new, longer question appearing character by character.

description: Cursor hovers over the close button of the current browser tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'X' icon on the active 'Askable Sessions' tab.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab before clicking.
frame_description: The cursor moves from the close button to the center of the adjacent tab.

description: User clicks on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab to switch views.
frame_description: The browser tab is activated.

description: The view switches to the Figma prototype showing the opportunity list.
frame_description: The screen content changes from the dark session page to a mobile app prototype with a list of tasks.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Short tasks & surveys' section header.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the text heading in the prototype.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' task card.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to rest on the first task card in the list.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Askable Sessions' tab in the browser.
frame_description: The cursor moves back up to the browser's tab bar.

description: User clicks the 'Askable Sessions' tab to return to the session instructions.
frame_description: The first tab is clicked.

description: The view switches back to the session instruction screen.
frame_description: The screen returns to the dark background with the central prompt.

description: User types a detailed question: 'What are you seeing on the screen that indicates how much time that survey might take compared to the other?'
frame_description: New text is being typed onto the screen, replacing the previous question.

description: User clicks on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab again.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the third tab.

description: The view switches back to the Figma prototype.
frame_description: The mobile app prototype is visible again.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' card while likely discussing it.
frame_description: The cursor stays over the task card for several seconds.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Askable Sessions' tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the tab bar.

description: Cursor hovers over the close button of the Figma tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'X' on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab.

description: User clicks the 'Askable Sessions' tab.
frame_description: The first tab is clicked.

description: The view switches back to the session instruction screen.
frame_description: The dark session screen is visible.

description: User types a complex question about the UI labels: 'As you're looking at these options that are both labeled as 10 minutes, is there anything else on the screen you're curious about or would want to click on?'
frame_description: A long block of text is typed onto the screen.

description: User types a transition statement: 'It sounds like you've explored the features that were relevant to your lunch break. Shall we move on from this prototype?'
frame_description: The text on screen updates with a new prompt character by character.

description: User types concluding instructions: 'Perfect, thank you. Please close the website task and we'll continue our session.'
frame_description: The final instruction is typed onto the screen.
